allow: Bash(psql postgresql://postgres:zouqingshan2017@localhost:5432/ad_fontes-test -c "SELECT to_regclass\('public.words_v2'\) IS NOT NULL AS exists;")
Bash(psql postgresql://postgres:zouqingshan2017@localhost:5432/ad_fontes-test -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\), language FROM words_v2 GROUP BY language;")

Bash(psql postgresql://postgres:zouqingshan2017@localhost:5432/ad_fontes-test -c "SELECT lemma, language, jsonb_pretty\(content\)->'yield'->'lemma' AS yaml_lemma, jsonb_pretty\(content\)->'etymology' IS NOT NULL AS has_etymology, jsonb_pretty\(content\)->'cognate_family' IS NOT NULL AS has_cognates FROM words_v2 LIMIT 3;")

Bash(psql postgresql://postgres:zouqingshan2017@localhost:5432/ad_fontes-test -c "SELECT lemma, language, content->'yield'->>'lemma' AS yaml_lemma, \(content->'etymology'\) IS NOT NULL AS has_etymology, \(content->'cognate_family'\) IS NOT NULL AS has_cognates FROM words_v2 LIMIT 3;")

Bash(node -e "const Database = require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db = new Database\('./data/ad_fontes.db'\); const count = db.prepare\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM words_v2'\).get\(\); console.log\('words_v2 row count:', count.cnt\); const byLang = db.prepare\('SELECT language, COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM words_v2 GROUP BY language'\).all\(\); console.log\('by language:', JSON.stringify\(byLang\)\); db.close\(\);")

Bash(node -e "const Database = require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db = new Database\('./data/ad_fontes.db'\); const tables = db.prepare\(\\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'\\"\).all\(\); console.log\('Tables:', JSON.stringify\(tables.map\(t=>t.name\)\)\); db.close\(\);")

Bash(node -e "const Database=require\('better-sqlite3'\);const db=new Database\('../web/data/ad_fontes.db'\);const rows=db.prepare\('SELECT lemma,language FROM words_v2 LIMIT 5'\).all\(\);console.log\(JSON.stringify\(rows,null,2\)\);db.close\(\)")

Bash(node -e "const Database=require\('better-sqlite3'\);const db=new Database\('./web/data/ad_fontes.db'\);db.pragma\('journal_mode=WAL'\);const fs=require\('fs'\);const mig=fs.readFileSync\('./drizzle/0001_drop_local_tables.sql','utf8'\).replaceAll\('--> statement-breakpoint',''\);db.exec\(mig\);const tables=db.prepare\(\\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'\\"\).all\(\);console.log\('Tables:',tables.map\(t=>t.name\)\);db.close\(\)")

Bash(node -e "const Database=require\('better-sqlite3'\);const db=new Database\('./data/ad_fontes.db'\);db.pragma\('journal_mode=WAL'\);const fs=require\('fs'\);const mig=fs.readFileSync\('../../drizzle/0001_drop_local_tables.sql','utf8'\).replaceAll\('--> statement-breakpoint',''\);db.exec\(mig\);const tables=db.prepare\(\\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'\\"\).all\(\);console.log\('Tables:',tables.map\(t=>t.name\)\);db.close\(\)")

Bash(node -e "const Database=require\('better-sqlite3'\);const db=new Database\('./data/ad_fontes.db'\);const fs=require\('fs'\);const path=require\('path'\);const migPath=path.resolve\(__dirname,'../drizzle/0001_drop_local_tables.sql'\);const mig=fs.readFileSync\(migPath,'utf8'\).replaceAll\('--> statement-breakpoint',''\);db.exec\(mig\);const tables=db.prepare\(\\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'\\"\).all\(\);console.log\('Tables:',tables.map\(t=>t.name\)\);db.close\(\)")
Bash(python -c "import yaml; data = yaml.safe_load\(open\('_test_yaml.yaml', encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('Parse OK'\); print\(data.keys\(\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const yaml = require\('js-yaml'\); const fs = require\('fs'\); const data = yaml.load\(fs.readFileSync\('_test_yaml.yaml', 'utf8'\)\); console.log\('Parse OK'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(data\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const YAML = require\('yaml'\); const fs = require\('fs'\); try { const data = YAML.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('_test_yaml.yaml', 'utf8'\)\); console.log\('Parse OK'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(data\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('Parse ERROR:', e.message\); }")
